company.raw_notes: The domain natanitsolutions.com resolves to a brand-new, out-of-the-box WordPress site with zero real content. The org_name 'Natan IT Solutions' suggests an IT services or solutions company, but this is only inferred from the name — nothing on the site confirms it. Web searches for 'natanitsolutions.com' and 'Natan IT Solutions' returned no matching results; all search results returned were unrelated companies (NAT IT Solutions at natitsolutions.com, NAT IT Solutions at natitsolution.com, Nahum Natan Technology Solutions in Israel, NAN IT Solutions in Ontario, etc.). None of these are the same entity as the signup.
